response.original_title: And the Balls Roll On...: The Real Story of the Beautiful Game of Skee-Ball
response.overview: A 1908 patent by NJ inventor J.F. Simpson birthed Skee-Ball amid industrial-era amusement parks. Follow the game's journey from working-class entertainment to beloved pastime. The balls keep rolling.
response.title: And the Balls Roll On...: The Real Story of the Beautiful Game of Skee-Ball
